Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: You have definitely led une vie intéressante.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I did sense some undue humilité in your words. If I am right, my advice is that you should not worry at all ! During my long travels, I have talked with many from different walks of life.

Line.Text: I have come to understand what « boring » truly means, and you are far from reaching even un pourcentage de la définition.

Choices.Text: You might be reading too much into this.
Nope. I'm as boring as they come.
No offense, man, but it doesn't take much to be more interesting that the Fr*nch.
